_comment: Genesis config for the `local` Hardhat network. Loaded by scripts/deploy-univerify.ts. Each `account` is the H160 that `pallet-revive`'s AccountId32Mapper derives for the university's real Polkadot SS58 account (keccak256(pubkey)[-20:]). When the university signs a `Revive.call` extrinsic from PWAllet / Polkadot.js, pallet-revive presents exactly this H160 as msg.sender, so these are the three wallets that can issue and be governed by the contract. metadataHash=0x00..00 means no off-chain metadata; real deployments should use keccak256 of the institution's DID document or IPFS CID.
